pages.text: Research is organized into 7 tiers, each with a distinct color:$(br2)$(li)$(#888888)Irrecoverable$() — Broken, decorative only$(li)$(#FFFFFF)Unstable$() — Entry tier$(li)$(#55FF55)Basic$() — Core research$(li)$(#5555FF)Advanced$() — Mid-game$(li)$(#AA00AA)Precise$() — Late-game$(li)$(#FFAA00)Flawless$() — Endgame$(li)$(#FF5555)Self-Aware$() — Ultimate tier

pages.title: Tier Rules
pages.text: When starting research:$(br2)$(li)The $(thing)Cube$() tier must be ≥ the research tier$(li)The $(thing)Drive$() tier must exactly match the research tier$(br2)Higher-tier research may have $(thing)prerequisites$() — other research that must be completed first. Check the Research Encyclopedia for details.
